sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented for this tactical RPG

special_mechanics.name: Wanzer Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls mecha units (wanzers) on tactical grid-based battle map. Movement is turn-based, determined by leg part selection. Leg destruction reduces movement to single space per turn.

special_mechanics.name: Modular Part System
special_mechanics.description: Wanzers have four modular parts (body, left arm, right arm, legs). Each has independent health. Leg damage cripples movement speed.

tier_notes: Front Mission is a tactical RPG with grid-based movement, not a platformer or action game. Traditional physics parameters (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration) do not apply. Movement is determined by equipped mecha leg parts in turn-based combat.
